description: Expert-level LogQL deep dive — pattern matching, unwrap metrics, quantile_over_time, structured metadata, and log-to-trace correlation via Tempo.

panels.description: Total log lines ingested per second across all pods in the selected application and namespace.
panels.title: Log Lines/sec

panels.description: Error-level log lines per second. High values indicate active issues requiring investigation.
panels.title: Error Lines/sec

panels.description: Total log bytes per second. Monitor for unexpected spikes that may indicate logging storms or debug-level leaks.
panels.title: Bytes/sec

panels.description: Count of unique error message patterns. A rising count may signal new failure modes emerging.

targets.expr: count(topk(100, sum by (msg) (count_over_time({job="$app", namespace=~"$namespace"} | logfmt | level="error" [$__auto]))))

panels.title: Unique Error Patterns

panels.description: Warning-level log lines per second. Persistent warnings often precede escalation to errors.
panels.title: Warn Lines/sec

panels.description: 99th percentile request duration extracted from structured log fields using LogQL unwrap. Values above 2s indicate tail latency issues.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.99, {job="$app", namespace=~"$namespace"} | logfmt | unwrap duration(duration) [$__auto]) by ()

panels.title: P99 Log Duration

panels.description: Log volume broken down by severity level over time. Stacked area reveals the proportion of each level and helps spot error spikes.
panels.title: Log Volume by Severity

panels.description: Bytes throughput per pod over time. Identifies pods producing disproportionate log volume that may need log-level tuning.
panels.title: Log Throughput by Pod

panels.description: Most frequent error messages. Focus debugging on the top entries.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (msg) (count_over_time({job="$app", namespace=~"$namespace"} | logfmt | level="error" [$__auto])))

panels.title: Top 10 Error Messages

panels.description: Error-level log lines with structured fields and trace correlation. Click a TraceID to jump directly to the trace in Tempo.
panels.title: Error Logs with Context

panels.description: Requests taking >1s extracted from structured logs. Use this to identify slow endpoints and correlate with traces.
panels.title: Slow Requests from Logs

panels.description: Duration metrics extracted directly from log lines using LogQL unwrap. Compares P99 vs average latency per service.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.99, {job="$app", namespace=~"$namespace"} | logfmt | unwrap duration(duration) [$__auto]) by (service)
avg_over_time({job="$app", namespace=~"$namespace"} | logfmt | unwrap duration(duration) [$__auto]) by (service)

panels.title: Request Duration from Logs (P99)

panels.description: Server error responses (HTTP 5xx) detected via LogQL pattern parsing. Spikes correlate with backend failures or dependency issues.
panels.title: Server Error Pattern Detection

panels.description: Most active client IPs. Unusual spikes may indicate scanning or abuse.
panels.title: Top 10 Client IPs

panels.description: Full-width log viewer with trace correlation. Each log line with a trace_id links directly to Tempo. Use the Search Text variable to filter.
panels.title: Logs with Trace Links

panels.description: Log volume broken down by HTTP method extracted from structured log fields. Helps identify unusual traffic patterns.
panels.title: Logs by HTTP Method

panels.description: Log volume by HTTP status code extracted from structured metadata. Color-coded by status class to quickly spot error trends.
panels.title: Logs by HTTP Status

title: Loki — Logs Deep Dive & Pattern Analysis
